title: Waters (WAT) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?

title: Waters (WAT) to Attract Scientists With Extraction+ Device
text: Waters (WAT) unveils the Extraction+ Connected Device for the Waters Andrew+ Pipetting Robot. The device automates solid phase extraction methods, saving bench time for each sample set.

title: 3 Stocks to Watch on Rising Demand for Scientific Instruments
text: The Zacks Instruments - Scientific industry participants like Mettler-Toledo (MTD), Waters (WAT) and PerkinElmer (PKI) are gaining from strong life science, pharmaceutical and academic end-market demand, as well as rising healthcare spending.

title: Waters Automates Solid Phase Extraction of Biological, Food and Environmental Samples with Andrew+ Pipetting Robot
text: MILFORD, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #separationscience--Waters introduces Extraction+, a new connected device for the Andrew+ Pipetting Robot that automates solid phase extraction sample preparation methods

title: Sail Through Rough Waters With These 3 Low-Beta Stocks
text: Even though low-beta stocks have a lower return potential, they're great shields against volatility. After all, defense wins ballgames.

title: Waters Marks 25 Years in Ireland with €6 Million Clinical Diagnostics R&D Center Expansion in Wexford
text: WEXFORD, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #ClinicalDx--Waters Corporation commits multi-year investment with support from IDA Ireland to help accelerate life sciences industry growth in the South East.

title: Waters Corporation Schedules Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call
text: MILFORD, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) will hold its Q3 2022 financial results conference call live on Tuesday, November 1st 2022 at 8:00 a.m. eastern time. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on Waters' investor relations website at https://ir.waters.com. A replay of the webcast will also be available until at least November 15th, 2022, at midnight eastern time.
